root.name: Checklist Conversion to Two-Column Layout on Slide 8
root.description: Evaluates if the checklist on slide 8 has been correctly converted into a two-column layout, preserving content, saving space, and avoiding extraneous changes.

children.name: Checklist Content Preserved
children.description: The checklist items from the original slide 8 are all present in the modified slide, with no missing or altered items.

children.name: No Checklist Items Modified
children.description: Checks that no checklist items have been inadvertently modified (content-wise).

children.name: Two-Column Layout Applied
children.description: Checks that the checklist on slide 8 is displayed in a two-column layout, rather than a single column as in the original.

children.name: Checklist Rendered as Two Columns
children.description: Verifies that the checklist items are visually rendered in two columns on slide 8.

children.name: No Extraneous Changes to Other Slides
children.description: Checks that no slides except slide 8 were modified in content, layout, or style.

children.name: No Content or Layout Changes on Other Slides
children.description: No content, layout, or style changes were made to slides other than slide 8.

children.name: No Animations or Transitions Changed
children.description: Checks that no animations or transitions were added, removed, or changed on slide 8 or elsewhere.

children.name: No Animations or Transitions Added/Removed/Modified on Slide 8
children.description: No animation or transition changes on slide 8.

children.name: No Animations or Transitions Changed on Other Slides
children.description: No animation or transition changes on slides other than 8.

metadata.task: Convert the entire checklist on slide 8 into a two-column layout to save space
